      Personal Loan in Kerala

      Apply for your next personal loan in Kerala from Flexi Credit by Airtel Finance. Get the best loan offers, low rates of interest, instant credit approval, and flexible EMI repayment options. The process is completely digital. Apply on the Airtel Thanks app to get instant credit approval. Choose Airtel Flexi Credit for maximum convenience.

      Why Choose a Personal Loan in Kerala?

      Personal loans are useful for those who are looking for
      a quick financial boost. The biggest advantage of a personal loan
      in Kerala is that you will not have to offer any collateral in exchange.
      There is no restriction on how you may use the loan amount either.

      Apply Now Apply Now

      How to apply for a Personal Loan in Kerala?

      Follow simple steps as mentioned below

      Open Airtel Thanks app

      Find Shop > Airtel Finance

      Select Flexi Credit

      Fill in your basic details

      Get best offer

      Basis profile verification

      Complete the KYC

      Link your bank account

      Apply Now Apply Now

      Features of Personal Loan in Kerala

      With Airtel Flexi Credit, you get

      Personal loan amount

      ₹10,000 to ₹10,00,000

      Interest rates

      Starting from 12% p.a.

      Personal loan tenure

      03 to 60 months

      Credit disbursal

      Within 24 hours

      No paperwork

      100% online

      Low processing fee

      2% to 5% + GST

      Eligibility Criteria for Personal Loan in Kerala

      To be eligible for a Personal Loan in Kerala, borrowers need to meet some criteria

      Age must be above 18

      The borrower must be at least 18 years old to be eligible for an instant loan.

      Stable Income Source

      The borrower must have a stable source of income, such as a salary or business income.

      Minimum Credit Score

      The borrower should have a decent credit score to be eligible for a Personal Loan in Kerala.

      FAQs on Personal Loans in Kerala


      When you apply for your personal loans in Kerala with Airtel Flexi Credit, your interest rates will start at 12% per annum.




      There are no specific eligibility criteria when you apply for a personal loan in Kerala. Anyone can apply, but make sure you provide the correct information to the creditors during the application process.

      Yes, you can use the Airtel Thanks app to apply for your personal loan in Kerala online. Here is the process: Open Airtel Thanks > on the shop tab, click Airtel Finance > select Airtel Flexi Credit > Enter your details and apply for your personal loan.

      If you are looking for special loan offers and low-interest rates for personal loans in Kerala, then choose Flexi Credit by Airtel Finance. Get the best loan offers, low processing charges, 100% digital process, instant credit approval, flexible EMI repayment tenures, and much more.

      If you apply for a personal loan in Kerala via Airtel Flexi Credit, then your instant personal loan approval will be completed instantly in a few seconds. You will also receive credit to your linked bank account within 24 hours.

      Here are some of the documents needed for a personal loan application in Kerala – name, address, Aadhaar number, PAN number, employment details and digital KYC.

      Yes, you can get a personal loan in Kerala with a low credit score as well, with Airtel Flexi Credit. Apply for your personal loan from the Airtel Thanks app and check out the loan offer.

      There are no government schemes or initiatives in Kerala offering personal loan assistance.

      When you apply for your short term loan in Kerala on Airtel Flexi Credit, you can get a maximum loan amount of ₹10,00,000.


      No, you can use your personal loan in Kerala in any manner you deem fit. There are no specific restrictions on how you may use the loan amount.




      There are no local fees associated with personal loans in Kerala. However, Airtel Flexi Credit charges a low processing fee of 2% to 5% + GST.

      Yes, you can prepay or foreclose a personal loan in Kerala if you wish. There are no penalties for doing so, but you will be charged a small amount for the foreclosure. To get more details on foreclosure charges, get in touch with the bank.

      You can use an EMI calculator to find out how much EMI you will have to pay after you have taken a personal loan in Kerala.

      No, the process remains the same for all personal loan applicants.

      If you default on your EMI payments, you will have to pay a fine and your cibil score will take a hit. However, repeated defaulting on personal loans may lead to a booking under section 420 of the Indian Penal Code, which includes imprisonment as well.

      Unfortunately, there are no special discounts or offers on personal loans during the festive seasons in Kerala.

      As of now, there are no specific benefits or considerations for senior citizens applying for personal loans in Kerala.

      For the best deals on your personal loans, check out Airtel Flexi Credit from Airtel Finance. Airtel offers multiple loans from various banks, with flexible loan tenures and an easy approval process.

      If you are looking for competitive rates on personal loans in Kerala, choose Airtel Flexi Credit. Get the best loan offers from multiple banks and repay with flexible EMI options.

      Yes, you can also apply for a personal loan if you are residing on the outskirts of Kerala. It will not affect the approval process at all. There is one single approval process that is valid for all citizens of India.
